gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer Kuhn the 2nd found a stale README release-bundle command that reproduced the 23-artifact bundle instead of the documented 24-artifact bundle. The branch added --legacy-migration-evidence-json to the command, documented when to include it, added tests for the strict+compatibility+legacy 24-artifact bundle shape, reran verification, and the same reviewer approved PR #441 with no remaining findings.
verification: Local strict release bundle databricks-runs/current-governance/complete-strict-release-bundle-with-g5-post-440-current-wheel.json -> ok=true, artifact_count=24, includes legacy_migration_evidence
GPT-5.5 reviewer Kuhn the 2nd found one stale README command; fixed by adding --legacy-migration-evidence-json and a 24-artifact release-bundle regression, then re-review approved with no findings
what_changed: Updated README and the V1 requirements matrix to reflect the refreshed post-#440 strict release bundle with 24 artifacts, including legacy_migration_evidence for the removed restaurant facade.
Updated release-bundle documentation so the canonical command includes --legacy-migration-evidence-json and explains when to carry package-surface cleanup evidence.
Pinned governance and release-bundle tests to both the compatibility-only 23-artifact shape and the compatibility-plus-legacy 24-artifact shape.
why: Keep the human-facing Cachet release status aligned with the refreshed strict release bundle after the legacy restaurant facade was removed, without treating pr-evidence or ignored scratch directories as benchmark archives.
